summary: Patients at Create Fertility - St. Paul's were most dissatisfied with general issues ("Other" complaints, 11 reviews) and treatment quality (6 reviews), though concerns about value, communication, and doctors were also noted. Out of 87 negative reviews, these top five categories accounted for 35% of complaints.
